findings.summary: ZX Spectrum clone/expansion rev.B (KiCad 5, 216 components). Y-flip transform causes collector/emitter pin swap on BJTs. False LED driver detection for Q1/D12 with no shared nets. DC-DC converter not detected as regulator.

correct.description: Digital logic ICs (buffers, latches, memory) correctly classified
Voltage dividers for biasing correctly detected

incorrect.description: NPN transistors with (1,0,0,-1) Y-flip transform have collector/emitter pins swapped — Q2 reports emitter=+5V (should be collector), Q1 reports collector=GND (should be emitter), Q3 has both C/E on same net
Q1 falsely identified as LED driver for D12/R13 — no shared nets, ~142mm apart on schematic

missed.description: U6 AM1S-0512SZ isolated DC-DC converter not detected as power regulator — generates +12V rail

suggestions: Fix Y-flip (1,0,0,-1) transform matrix handling for Q_NPN_CBE in KiCad 5 legacy
LED driver detection should require net connectivity between transistor and LED
Recognize isolated DC-DC converter modules as power regulators
